character.name: A 32px low top-down pixel art fantasy MMORPG mage character. Small blue hooded wizard wearing a deep blue robe with gold trim, holding a wooden magic staff with a small glowing crystal. Arcane caster style, clean dark outline, readable silhouette, chibi RPG proportions, consistent Tiny Swords style, no background, no text, no labels, centered character, transparent background if possible.
